name: Ang Choon Tee PM5
quote_en: Cheng Boon is a responsible, helpful, and compassionate person. When I was serving as the Secretary of Eunos Mandarin Toastmasters Club, she guided me to carry out my role well. Although this was not part of her duty, she still took the time to help me. Her willingness to support others could also be seen during events where we served together as team members, such as the 100th Toastmasters Anniversary. A true leader not only has knowledge and skills, but is also willing to share, guide, and help others grow. Cheng Boon has all these qualities. She is approachable, always willing to go the extra mile, and constantly seeks to improve herself. She also generously shares her experience with others. She is truly a leader I deeply respect and admire.
